funds_data.description: The fund’s strategy includes three components: (i) Equity Portfolio: holding equity shares of companies that have principal business activities in the “crypto asset” industry, referred to herein as “Crypto Industry Companies”; (ii)Crypto Portfolio: providing exposure to the share price of: a. select U.S.-listed “ETFs” and/or “ETPs” that seek exposure to bitcoin, which is a crypto asset, and b. select U.S.-listed ETPs and ETFs that seek exposure to ether and (iii) options Overlay: generating income through an options portfolio. The fund is non-diversified.
